## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm verify` passes locally (lint, format, typecheck, coverage, build, pack)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] A changeset was added (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects a published package
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
